message:
perf: disable gas metering by default for zero overhead

- gas_metering now defaults to false (was true)
- gas_limit > 0 auto-enables gas_metering
- No config = no instrumentation = 0% overhead
- With gas_limit set = ~2-5% overhead (acceptable tradeoff)

Config examples:
  {} → no metering, 0% overhead
  {"gas_limit": 1000000} → metering enabled, ~2-5% overhead
